finding: Deleted CLI export.ts (still in HEAD) has mature message-content-level sanitization (redact(), data(), span(), diff(), source(), filepart(), part() helpers). This is richer than the session-level sanitization planned for v1 and should be extracted into session-export.ts instead of writing new sanitization. The import.ts has share URL parsing (parseShareUrl) and Database-level write logic that can be referenced for the import endpoint.
repair_path: Extract redact helpers from git HEAD:packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/export.ts into packages/opencode/src/session/session-export.ts. Reference parseShareUrl from import.ts for v2 share URL import.

finding: Condition 1: importSession calls Session.use.create() which requires InstanceState.context. No active instance exists during file import. Plan doesn't address this.
repair_path: importSession must create a synthetic instance context or use a standalone Effect that bypasses the instance requirement. Use fork()'s existing pattern which already handles instance-less creation.

finding: Condition 2: Platform bridge missing. Dialogs call window.api.* directly instead of using Platform type from platform.tsx. Breaks web support.
repair_path: Use the existing Platform interface (platform.tsx) which abstracts saveFilePickerDialog/openFilePickerDialog. Add methods if needed.

finding: Condition 3: Non-existent file reference. Plan references routes/session.ts which doesn't exist. Actual files are groups/session.ts + handlers/session.ts.
repair_path: Update plan to reference correct file paths. Fix-B server endpoint files: groups/session.ts + handlers/session.ts (routes/ doesn't exist).

finding: B1: sanitizeSession() function is created but never called. exportSession Effect hardcodes sanitized: false. Semantic lie — function exists but no export/import ever sanitizes anything.
repair_path: Wire sanitizeSession() into exportSession(), or remove the function if sanitization is deferred to v2.

finding: B2: messages({limit:500}) silently drops messages beyond 500. No user warning or pagination loop. Large sessions get truncated without notice.
repair_path: Either loop with cursor pagination to get all messages, or add a warning when messages.length >= 500.

finding: B3: 17 of 18 locale files lack the 23 new i18n keys. Only en.ts has them. Non-English users see raw key paths.
repair_path: Copy all 23 key-value pairs (with English fallbacks) to all 17 other locale files, or use a base fallback pattern to inherit from en.ts.
